data.title: Party Supplies Market Expected to Reach USD 28.7 Billion by 2032, at a CAGR of 9.0%: Allied Market Research
data.description: The party supplies market is projected to experience significant growth up to 2032 due to an increase in social gatherings and events, the rising impact of social media, and the rapid growth of e-commerce platforms. These key factors are expected to drive market expansion, with numbers indicating a strong upward trend in demand. The data was disclosed in Wilmington, Delaware on April 14, 2026, by Allied Market Research.

data.title: MARCH VOLUMES: CONTINUED GOOD MOMENTUM
data.description: In March 2026, the total volume of ferry freight reached 3.9 million lane meters, marking a 4.2% increase compared to the previous year. When accounting for route adjustments, the volume was up by 3.0%.

data.title: VIPRE Security Group Launches VIPRE Security Training for Students, a Cybersecurity Education Series for the Next Generation of Digital Users
data.description: On April 14, 2026, VIPRE Security Group, a prominent player in the cybersecurity industry, revealed the introduction of VIPRE Security Training for Students. This initiative aims to provide cybersecurity education to individuals between five and 18 years old. The course series is tailored to equip young learners with essential knowledge and skills related to cybersecurity, privacy, and data protection.

data.title: Basware Launches Industry-First AI Agent Training for Finance Professionals
data.description: Creating the Finance Teams of Tomorrow: Discover efficient ways to oversee AI agents as digital colleagues rather than substitutes. Basware, a top player in Invoice Lifecycle Management (ILM), unveiled a cutting-edge training program on April 14, 2026 in Charlotte, N.C. to help professionals adapt to the changing landscape. This initiative aims to empower individuals to navigate this shift towards collaboration with AI seamlessly.

data.title: Organisations in the US, UK and Germany unprepared for large-scale digital disruption, new study finds
data.description: According to a recent study by Economist Impact supported by Telstra International, only 25% of organizations effectively respond to real disruption events due to governance and ecosystem shortcomings, which increase risks. The study, based in London and conducted on April 14, 2026, focused on organizations in the United States.

data.title: Clodura.AI Launches Atlas, an AI-Native SDR that Replaces the Fragmented Outbound Stack
data.description: Atlas utilizes constantly updated and validated data from over 600 million contacts to integrate data, insights, and implementation, resulting in industry-leading response rates that are 8 times higher and open rates exceeding 40%. This innovation was reported in Pune, India on April 14, 2026. It was highlighted that the typical sales representative currently utilizes over six different tools to operate a single task.

data.title: ITRI Launches 2026 VLSI TSA International Symposium, Spotlighting Quantum Architecture and AI-Driven Healthcare
data.description: Taking place in Hsinchu, Taiwan from April 13 to 17, the 2026 International Symposium on VLSI Technology, Systems, and Applications (VLSI TSA) is being hosted by the Industrial Technology Research Institute (ITRI). This marks the 43rd year of the symposium.

data.title: CS Analytical Names Jennifer Roark to Director of Scientific Affairs
data.description: Jen has over three decades of expertise in analytical chemistry and quality control testing in a cGMP setting. Her specializations include extractables, leachables, and container closure integrity testing for pharmaceutical packaging systems and drug delivery devices.

data.title: AC Milan and Corpay Cross-Border Extend Their Partnership
data.description: AC Milan and Corpay, Inc.* (NYSE: CPAY) have recently extended their partnership agreement, with Corpay's Cross-Border business serving as the Official Commercial Foreign Exchange Partner of the Club. This long-term deal solidifies their successful collaboration and combines the innovative approaches of both organizations. AC Milan, boasting a massive fanbase of over 500 million globally, aligns well with Corpay's international focus. The partnership underscores a shared commitment to innovation and global reach.
The Spanish antitrust chief says tighter monitoring of fuel prices is in place, with a report due by the end of May.

data.title: Serstech receives 4.3 MSEK order from India
data.description: Today, Serstech secured a significant order of 4.3 million Swedish Krona (MSEK) from Kapri Corp, their partner based in India. The order encompasses the Serstech Arx mkII device along with its associated software. Delivery and invoicing for this order are scheduled for the second quarter of 2026.
